query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A circular, dark opening centered on a horizontal band, surrounded by concentric ring patterns on an orange-toned surface. The band extends across the frame at a slight diagonal, with small dark marks visible along its length. The overall image has a warm orange monochrome palette.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A circular, dark opening centered on a horizontal band, surrounded by concentric ring patterns on an orange-toned surface with a sickly orange cast that permeates every element. The image has a soft, blurred quality that reduces fine detail, and flat lighting that collapses depth into a two-dimensional graphic appearance, producing a murky, suffocating atmosphere.
